Pure string checks can't catch symlinks; realpath checks can't run on nonexistent paths. Sequencing `mkdir` before `assertRealPathInside` on write is the canonical way to get both.\n`─────────────────────────────────────────────────`\n\nE-14 is fully done. The backend at `api/v1/projects/[id]/control-loops.ts` handles GET (returns defaults on first use) and PUT (validates, atomically writes to `{workspace}/projects/{id}/config/control-loops.json`). All 13 tests pass. E-14 is now `[done]` in BACKLOG.md."}
